items.title: While they didn't get him, Ball represents the type of swing the Raptors should make: plus-shooter, fits along Scottie's timeline, helps create and not just finish possessions.
items.author: Eric Koreen
items.body_excerpt:
While they didn't get him, Ball represents the type of swing the Raptors should make: plus-shooter, fits along Scottie's timeline, helps create and not just finish possessions. 

There aren't that many of those guys available, of course.

items.title: Tracy McGrady Was Nearly Traded to the Bulls on Draft Night As Part of a Deal for Scottie Pippen
items.author: Cousins with Vince Carter & Tracy McGrady
items.body_excerpt: Tracy McGrady was nearly traded to the Chicago Bulls on draft night as part of a deal for Scottie Pippen. Michael Jordan and Jerry Reinsdorf put a stop to it. 😧 #nba #basketball #tracymcgrady #podcast #vincecarter #nbashorts #hoops #nbapodcast #nbadraft #chicago #chicagobulls

items.title: June 20, 1993: Scottie Pippen drives and dunks on Charles Barkley in Game 6 of the NBA Finals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 20, 1993: Scottie Pippen drives and dunks on Charles Barkley in Game 6 of the NBA Finals.

Pippen had 23 PTS/12 REB/5 AST/4 STL and Michael Jordan had 33 PTS/8 REB/7 AST in the Bulls' 99-98 win over the Phoenix Suns that earned Chicago its third-straight NBA Championship.

items.title: June 2, 1989: Scottie Pippen falls to the floor after taking an elbow to the head, then is dragged off the floor by referee Joey Crawford while play continues in Game 6 of the Eastern Conference Finals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 2, 1989: Scottie Pippen falls to the floor after taking an elbow to the head, then is dragged off the floor by referee Joey Crawford while play continues in Game 6 of the Eastern Conference Finals.

The Pistons defeated the Bulls, 103-94, and advanced to the NBA Finals.

items.title: May 31, 1998: Chicago's Scottie Pippen drives and scores with two minutes to go in Game 7 of the Eastern Conference Finals against Indiana.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 31, 1998: Chicago's Scottie Pippen drives and scores with two minutes to go in Game 7 of the Eastern Conference Finals against Indiana.

Pippen had 17 PTS/12 REB/2 STL and Michael Jordan had 28 PTS/9 REB/8 AST in the Bulls' 88-83 win. The Pacers' Reggie Miller scored 22 PTS.

items.title: May 30, 2000: Portland's Scottie Pippen finishes with 22 PTS (8-12 FG)/6 REB/6 STL/4 BLK in a 96-88 win over the Lakers in Game 5 of the Western Conference Finals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 30, 2000: Portland's Scottie Pippen finishes with 22 PTS (8-12 FG)/6 REB/6 STL/4 BLK in a 96-88 win over the Lakers in Game 5 of the Western Conference Finals.

Rasheed Wallace added 22 PTS/10 REB for the Blazers. Shaquille O'Neal had 31 PTS/21 REB/2 BLK for Los Angeles.
